title: Targeted Tests
description: Choose tests that prove behavior instead of file presence. Include negative fixtures for bad models, hand-edited generat
body: Choose tests that prove behavior instead of file presence. Include negative fixtures for bad models, hand-edited generated artifacts, malformed hook input, and unsupported provider capabilities. This skill is used by OAL acceptance and route execution to keep investigation evidence-based and avoid speculative fixes. It must be rendered into provider skill surfaces and referenced by route or agent contracts.
